_comment: Expression presets: maps mood keywords to facial expression prompts. Multiple keys (synonyms/translations) can map to the same prompt.

happy.prompt: warm genuine smile, bright sparkling eyes, raised cheeks, relaxed brow

sad.prompt: downturned lips, glistening eyes, furrowed brow, slightly lowered gaze

angry.prompt: tight jaw, narrowed eyes, deeply furrowed brow, lips pressed firmly together

surprised.prompt: wide open eyes, raised eyebrows, slightly open mouth, head tilted back

disgusted.prompt: wrinkled nose, upper lip raised, narrowed eyes, head tilted slightly away

fearful.prompt: wide eyes, raised eyebrows, tense jaw, lips slightly parted

neutral.prompt: confident smirk, one eyebrow slightly raised, eyes direct and steady, lips slightly pursed

amused.prompt: slight smirk, eyes crinkled with amusement, one corner of mouth raised

bored.prompt: half-lidded eyes, slightly slack jaw, blank unfocused gaze

confused.prompt: furrowed brow, squinting eyes, head tilted to one side, lips slightly parted

content.prompt: soft relaxed smile, calm half-closed eyes, peaceful serene expression

curious.prompt: wide attentive eyes, slightly raised eyebrows, head tilted forward

determined.prompt: set jaw, focused intense eyes, brow slightly furrowed, lips pressed together

embarrassed.prompt: flushed cheeks, averted gaze, tight-lipped shy smile, brow slightly raised

excited.prompt: wide bright eyes, open mouth smile, raised eyebrows, radiating energy

flirty.prompt: half-lidded eyes, playful smirk, chin slightly lowered, looking up through lashes

grateful.prompt: warm soft smile, glistening appreciative eyes, relaxed open expression

nervous.prompt: tight forced smile, wide darting eyes, tense brow, biting lower lip slightly

proud.prompt: chin raised, confident broad smile, chest forward, eyes gleaming

relaxed.prompt: soft half-smile, droopy calm eyes, loose relaxed jaw, serene expression

shy.prompt: downcast eyes, slight blush, timid small smile, head slightly turned away

thoughtful.prompt: slightly narrowed eyes gazing into distance, lips gently pursed, pensive expression

tired.prompt: heavy drooping eyelids, slight yawn, dark circles, unfocused distant gaze

worried.prompt: creased forehead, tight pursed lips, wide anxious eyes, tense jaw

creative.prompt: bright focused eyes, slight knowing smile, head tilted, inspired engaged expression

focused.prompt: narrowed concentrated eyes, lips slightly pressed, brow tense, sharp attentive gaze

playful.prompt: mischievous grin, bright twinkling eyes, raised eyebrows, lively expression

loving.prompt: soft warm eyes, gentle tender smile, relaxed open expression, adoring gaze

confident.prompt: direct steady gaze, slight smirk, chin slightly raised, composed expression

frustrated.prompt: clenched jaw, narrowed eyes, tight pressed lips, furrowed brow, tense expression

hopeful.prompt: softly raised eyebrows, bright and expectant eyes, a gentle upward curve of the lips, and a relaxed jaw

vulnerable.prompt: downcast eyes, furrowed brows, slightly parted lips, tense jaw, openly exposed expression

guilty.prompt: drooping eyebrows, downcast eyes, a tight mouth, and a clenched jaw

insecure.prompt: dilated pupils, furrowed brows, slightly parted lips, and a tense jaw

relieved.prompt: relaxed brow, soft crinkled eyes, gentle upward turn of the lips, and a completely unclenched jaw

shocked.prompt: wide unblinking eyes, sharply raised eyebrows, a dropped jaw, and a slightly parted mouth

expectant.prompt: bright attentive eyes, slightly raised eyebrows, a gently parted mouth, and a relaxed jaw

flattered.prompt: softened eyes crinkling at the corners, slightly raised eyebrows, warm genuine smile that lifts the cheeks with relaxed jaw

jealous.prompt: narrowed eyes, furrowed brows, tight lips, and clenched jaw

overwhelmed.prompt: drooping eyebrows, wide staring eyes, a tight pressed mouth, and a clenched jaw

desperate.prompt: tightened jaw, furrowed brows, wide pleading eyes, and trembling lips

satisfied.prompt: soft crinkled eyes, slightly raised inner eyebrows, relaxed jaw, contented closed-mouth smile

euphoric.prompt: bright sparkling eyes, raised eyebrows, wide radiant smile, and a relaxed jaw

fulfilled.prompt: soft crinkles at the corners of bright content eyes, a relaxed brow, and a gentle satisfied smile that lifts the cheeks

exuberant.prompt: bright sparkling eyes, raised cheeks, wide open-mouthed grin, and relaxed jaw

talkative.prompt: engaged and animated eyes, a slight upward curve to the mouth, relaxed and open eyebrows, and a lively ready jaw

moved.prompt: soft glistening eyes, a gentle involuntary smile, relaxed eyebrows, and a loose vulnerable jaw

drunk.prompt: heavy unfocused eyes, drooping eyebrows, slack mouth, and loose jaw

cautious.prompt: slightly furrowed brows, narrowed eyes scanning the surroundings, a tight mouth with pressed lips, and a tense jaw

adventurous.prompt: bright wide eyes with raised eyebrows, a wide eager grin, and a relaxed jaw

loved.prompt: soft crinkled eyes, gently raised eyebrows, a warm open-mouthed smile, and a completely relaxed jaw
